caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio with gray acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. In front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm that reads "Shure SM7B". The man has a tattoo on his right arm. He begins by raising his right hand in a gesturing motion while looking slightly to the side. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arm and speaks into the microphone, shifting his gaze and slightly adjusting his facial expression. His mouth opens as he talks, and he remains positioned in the same spot throughout the clip. The lighting is consistent, focusing on the man and his equipment against the textured background of the sound-treated room.
